notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Denzer Guzman out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop Colt Emerson to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Wade Meckler out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Denzer Guzman. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Josh Naylor to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jose Siri called out on strikes.
